description: Baseline: intelligence-driven clustering. 89 L0→8 L1→4 L2 (no single apex). Classification bottleneck ~10min.
Streamlined classify + all prompts. 90 L0→9 L1→5 L2→1 L3. Single apex but WRONG topic (legal, not overview). Clustering still ~10min.
Apex-aware distill. Timed out at 20min. 127 L0→11 L1, never reached L2. Upper layer synthesis didn't complete.
